Professional Summary

Passionate about People,
Driven by Purpose

I am an HR & Talent Acquisition Executive currently serving as the sole HR representative at Uboard India Ltd., overseeing comprehensive talent acquisition and HR operations. A recent B.Com (Programme) graduate from Dyal Singh College, Delhi University (CGPA 7.2), I bring 2+ years of progressive, hands-on experience in strategic workforce planning and talent management across technology, banking, services, and consulting sectors.

My professional trajectory encompasses the complete talent lifecycle — from strategic recruitment planning and end-to-end candidate sourcing to structured onboarding, HR documentation, and HRMS administration. I have independently facilitated seamless integration of 15+ hires, with demonstrated capability in managing complex recruitment pipelines with precision and speed. My expertise extends to AI-enabled recruitment technologies and modern ATS platforms, enabling data-driven hiring decisions and enhanced candidate experiences.

I approach HR operations with a structured, execution-focused methodology, underpinned by strong stakeholder management and cross-functional communication skills. I work collaboratively with organizational leadership on hiring strategies, workforce planning requirements, and talent strategy alignment. My track record includes successful candidate conversions to permanent roles, reflecting a deep commitment to sustainable talent acquisition and organizational growth.

Why HR

I am fundamentally driven by the belief that exceptional talent acquisition and strategic HR management are the cornerstones of organizational success. I see HR not merely as an administrative function, but as a strategic business partner—responsible for identifying and nurturing talent that drives innovation, culture, and sustainable growth. My commitment lies in building high-performing teams, optimizing workforce planning, and creating meaningful employee experiences that foster long-term organizational value.
